scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter './artifacts/**' --filter './scripts' --filter '!./artifacts/mockup-sandbox' --if-present run build
scripts.db:reset-local: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c 'DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f ./lib/db/drizzle/0000_colorful_synch.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f ./lib/db/drizzle/seed.sql
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --filter '!./artifacts/mockup-sandbox' --if-present run typecheck
